scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k "bun run --env-file ../../.env --cwd apps/api dev" "bun run --env-file ../../.env --cwd apps/agent-runner dev" "bun run --env-file ../../.env --cwd apps/ui dev"
scripts.prod:all: bun run build && concurrently -k "bun run --env-file ../../.env --cwd apps/api start" "bun run --env-file ../../.env --cwd apps/agent-runner start" "bun run --env-file ../../.env --cwd apps/ui preview"
scripts.lint:all: bun run --cwd apps/api lint && bun run --cwd apps/agent-runner lint && bun run --cwd apps/ui lint && bun run --cwd packages/db lint && bun run --cwd packages/schemas lint && bun run --cwd packages/event-bus lint && bun run --cwd packages/llm lint && bun run --cwd packages/crypto lint && bun run --cwd packages/skills lint && bun run --cwd packages/events-scenario-tests lint
